zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Cuthbert Murray of Cockpool於大約1433年出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾考普爾時，他的父親Sir Charles Karel Murray19歲，母親Lady Margaret Erskine23歲。他於1457年與Marjory or Mariota Menzies在蘇格蘭度福利爾考普爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1493年在英國蘇格蘭享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Cuthbert Murray of Cockpool于大约1433年出生在苏格兰度福利爾考普爾时，他的父亲Sir Charles Karel Murray19岁，母亲Lady Margaret Erskine23岁。他于1457年与Marjory or Mariota Menzies在苏格兰度福利爾考普爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1493年在英国苏格兰享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Murray
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Moray in northeastern Scotland, which derives from Celtic mori- ‘sea’ + treb- ‘settlement’. The founder of the Scottish house of Murray was a Fleming named Freskin who was granted Strathbrock in West Lothian and Duffus in Moray by David I. The family took its name from the region in the late 12th century.
Irish and Scottish: shortened form of   McMurray  .
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Muireadhaigh ‘descendant of Muireadhach’ a personal name meaning ‘mariner’. Occasionally it may be a shortened form of McMurray .

variants.name: Murry
meanings: Scottish and Irish: variant of   Murray  .

variants.name: Murrah
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish   Murray  .

variants.name: Murie
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Murie in Errol (Perthshire).
Scottish and Irish: variant of   Murray  .

variants.name: Merhi
meanings: Arabic (mainly Lebanon and Syria): from a variant of the personal name Mirhi of unknown meaning. Bearers of this surname are both Muslims and Christians. Compare Murray 5.

variants.name: McMurray
meanings: Irish (northern) and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Muireadhaigh or Mac Muireadhaich, a patronymic from the personal name Muireadhach ‘seafarer’ (see Murdoch ). Compare McCurry 1.

variants.name: Murra
meanings: Italian (Sicily): topographic name from Sicilian murra ‘large rock, mass of rocks’ or a habitational name from a place called with this word.
Albanian: nickname from murrë (definite form murra) ‘dark gray cow’.

nameMeanings.name: Cuthbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name composed of cūð ‘known’ + beorht ‘bright, famous’. This was borne by two pre-Conquest English saints: a 7th-century bishop of Lindisfarne and an 8th-century archbishop of Canterbury who corresponded with St Boniface . The name has been in more or less continuous use in the northern counties of England from the 13th century, though its use has declined over recent decades.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Cuthbert Murray of Cockpool was born about 1433, in Cockpool, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, his father, Sir Charles Karel Murray, was 19 and his mother, Lady Margaret Erskine, was 23. He married Marjory or Mariota Menzies in 1457, in Cockpool, Dumfriesshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1493, in Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Cuthbert Murray of Cockpool est né environ 1433, à Cockpool, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Charles Karel Murray, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Erskine, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Marjory or Mariota Menzies en 1457, à Cockpool, Dumfriesshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1493, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Cuthbert Murray of Cockpool um 1433 in Cockpool, Dumfriesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Charles Karel Murray 19 und seine Mutter Lady Margaret Erskine 23. Er hat 1457 in Cockpool, Dumfriesshire, Scotland Marjory or Mariota Menzies geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1493 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Cuthbert Murray of Cockpool è nato il circa 1433 nel Cockpool, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Charles Karel Murray, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Lady Margaret Erskine, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Marjory or Mariota Menzies nel 1457, nel Cockpool, Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1493, nel Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Cuthbert Murray of Cockpoolが約1433年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアコクプオオルで生まれた時，父Sir Charles Karel Murrayは19歳，母Lady Margaret Erskineは23歳であった。1457年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアコクプオオルでMarjory or Mariota Menziesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1493年にイギリススコットランドで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Cuthbert Murray of Cockpool(이)가 대략 1433년 스컷랜드 드프리실르 콕포에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Charles Karel Murray(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret Erskine(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1457년 스컷랜드 드프리실르 콕포에서 Marjory or Mariota Menzies(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1493년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Cuthbert Murray of Cockpool nasceu aproximadamente 1433, em Cockpool, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Charles Karel Murray, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Erskine, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Marjory or Mariota Menzies em 1457, em Cockpool, Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1493, em Escócia, United Kingdom, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Cuthbert Murray of Cockpool родился около 1433 г. в местности коккпул, думфриессхир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Charles Karel Murray было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Erskine, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Marjory or Mariota Menzies в 1457 г. в местности коккпул, думфриессхир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1493 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Cuthbert Murray of Cockpool nació aproximadamente 1433, en Cockpool, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Charles Karel Murray, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret Erskine, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Marjory or Mariota Menzies en 1457, en Cockpool, Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1493, en Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 61 años.
